tldr: Isaac del Toro took the Jebel Hafeet summit finish and the overall, beating Luke Plapp and Felix Gall — the canonical UAE Tour climbing stage delivering the canonical UAE Tour winner. Evenepoel surrendered the leader's jersey on the climb that the ITT margin was never going to defend.

narrative.headline: Del Toro on Jebel Hafeet
narrative.body:
168 km from Al Ain Museum to the Jebel Hafeet summit, the canonical UAE Tour GC day. Del Toro attacked late on the climb; Plapp and Gall could hold for a small front group but couldn't gap him for the line.

The Evenepoel ITT margin from Stage 2 was always exposed on a climbing stage that asks more from the climbers than from the time-triallists. Del Toro retook the leader's jersey on the last selection.

gcImpact.headline: Del Toro takes the overall
gcImpact.body: The GC swung from Evenepoel to Del Toro on Jebel Hafeet — same template as previous UAE Tour editions on this climb.
